provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human female ship officer in a perfectly pressed steel-blue uniform with razor-sharp creases and gleaming gold buttons, not a single scuff or stain anywhere, the fabric looks freshly manufactured, brand new polished boots that have never touched a deck plate, she stands with perfect posture in front of a clean white background, everything about her looks like a recruitment poster not a real person
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Same issue — too pristine, too glamorous for gritty space.
